nasb.text: and so as to make a distinction between the holy and the profane, and between the unclean and the clean,

esv.text: You are to distinguish between the holy and the common, and between the unclean and the clean,

cnv.text: 使你們可以把聖的和俗的，潔淨的和不潔淨的，分辨清楚；

ccb.text: 你们必须明辨什么是圣洁的、什么是世俗的，什么是洁净的、什么是不洁净的。
